svg.text: DB Perf AI Agent — End User Flow
DBA journey from first login to resolved incident — 10 steps including DB Connector (HITL), ServiceNow KB, and DBA Copilot
Enter credentials: admin / dbperf2025 · dba / dba2025
Dashboard shown with stats, recent sessions, pipeline overview
Controls: classifier path · runbook source · AI Chat availability
RDS PI · Oracle AWR · pg_stat_statements · SQL Server QS · MySQL slow log
7 engines: Aurora MySQL/PG · RDS MySQL/PG/Oracle/SQL Server/MariaDB
Watch real-time SSE streaming progress panel
Click any query row to open its runbook
Table: Rank · SQL snippet · DB time % · Severity badge
Root cause chips: missing_index · lock_contention · vacuum_bloat ···
Demo: Curated steps w/ PI / CloudWatch / Enhanced Monitoring
Live: GPT-4o streams with engine-specific SQL, AWS console paths
Credentials held in browser memory only
Never stored to disk or server
Multi-layer read-only: SET SESSION READ ONLY + SQL allowlist/blocklist
Click Run on any runbook step SQL
Review: target DB + SQL shown in HITL modal
Click Confirm & Run to proceed · Cancel to abort
Payload pre-filled from active session runbook
Creates draft KB article at dev218436.service-now.com
DBA reviews and publishes from Knowledge Base module
Copy diagnostic SQL · Share report with team or stakeholders
4 Templates: Executive · Ops Alert · DBA Runbook · Technical
Pre-filled: db_name · severity · root causes · immediate actions
dbperf.aieksops.com · FastAPI + LangGraph + GPT-4o · DB Connector (HITL) · ServiceNow KB · DBA Copilot · EC2 t3.large us-west-1
